texto: The greatest wisdom is to make the enjoyment of the present the supreme object of life because that is the only reality
autor: all else being the play of thought. But it might as well be our greatest folly because that which exists only a moment and vanishes as a dream can never be worth a serious effort.
explicacao: Citação de all else being the play of thought.
